channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260317)
item.description:
What's New

refactor: Unify FocusedElementInfo and optimize AX API queries

  • Move FocusedElementInfo from AppDelegate to AppBehaviorDetector as a

public struct, eliminating duplicate struct definition. AppDelegate now

uses a typealias to the unified struct.

  • Add new fields to FocusedElementInfo: element (for hasCaret check),

roleDescription (for contenteditable detection), windowTitle (for rule

matching and signature), plus computed properties (signature,

isTextInput, hasCaret, isEditableTextInput) and factory method from().

  • Pass pre-queried FocusedElementInfo through detection chain to avoid

redundant AX API calls (~10 calls saved per focus change):

* detectInjectionMethod(focusedInfo:)

* detectIMKitBehavior(focusedInfo:)

* getMergedRuleResult(focusedInfo:)

* Browser address bar checks (Safari, Chromium, Firefox, Dia)

* getInjectionMethod(for:role:info:)

  • Optimize AppDelegate focus handling:

* Throttle AXObserver callbacks (100ms interval) to prevent rapid-fire

AX queries during autocomplete/animations

* logFinalMouseClickDetection now accepts pre-queried data and early

returns when debug window is not open

* Remove redundant detectInjectionMethod() calls in logging path

  • Fix overlay injection method delay: When overlay becomes visible,

immediately update confirmedInjectionMethod to prevent 0-500ms gap

where keystrokes use stale method from previous app

  • Remove unused convenience properties (hasMarkedTextIssues,

shouldPreferDirectInsertion, needsSelectionMethod, needsSlowInjection)

  • Bump build version to 20260317

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
